stemHtml: Upon extension of Fowler flaps whilst maintaining the same angle of attack:

options.a: C<sub>L</sub> increases, while C<sub>D</sub> remains unaffected.
options.b: C<sub>D</sub> decreases, while the centre of lift shifts aft.
options.c: C<sub>L</sub> decreases, while the centre of lift shifts forward.
